summary.en: Chinese AI company focusing on coding and reasoning models with cost-effective solutions.
summary.zh: 中国 AI 公司，专注于代码和推理模型，提供高性价比解决方案。

title.en: Silicon Flow API Key - Chinese Coding AI Models | Get Model Key
title.zh: 硅基流动 API Key - 中国代码 AI 模型 | Get Model Key

description.en: Get Silicon Flow API key for Chinese coding AI models. Access CogAgent, CodeGeeX and other coding-focused models.
description.zh: 获取硅基流动 API Key，访问中国代码 AI 模型。使用 CogAgent、CodeGeeX 等专注于代码的模型。

benefit.en: The platform often provides around CNY 16 in universal voucher credit (subject to official policy).
benefit.zh: 平台常见提供约 16 元通用代金券（以官方规则为准）。

notes.en: As an aggregator, one key can invoke multiple mainstream open-source models, reducing the need to register across many separate platforms.
notes.zh: 聚合平台形态下，一个 Key 即可调用多种主流开源模型，能明显减少多平台分别注册的成本。
